summary: Complete e2e testing of Biblical Scholar website payment system - Book of Amos paywall and Admin Dashboard. All backend APIs and frontend features working correctly.

issues: Minor: 'views' should be 'view' for singular count (e.g., '1 views' should be '1 view')

critical_code_review_comments: AdminDashboard.js line 15: ESLint warning - useEffect missing 'checkForNewSales' dependency. Consider using useCallback for checkForNewSales or adding eslint-disable comment.
BookOfAmos.js: Consider adding data-testid attributes to key elements (unlock button, verse sections) for better test automation
seed_data_creation: Test transactions created via API tests (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment system fully functional. Stripe integration working with test key sk_test_emergent. Admin dashboard polls every 5 seconds for real-time updates. Sound alerts implemented via Web Audio API. All transactions stored in MongoDB payment_transactions collection.

details: Page loads correctly with title 'Book of Amos'
Verses 1-5 displayed in interlinear format (free content)
Unlock Now button visible and clickable
View modes (Word-by-Word, Pure Hebrew, Bilingual) working
Checkout session created successfully via API
Redirect to Stripe checkout page working
Payment form fields present (email, card, name, country, ZIP)
LIVE indicator visible with '(checks every 5 seconds)'
Recent Transactions table displaying 4 test transactions
Page Views by Section showing 'Book of Amos' with 14 views
GET /api/ - Root endpoint returns Hello World
GET /api/analytics/dashboard - Returns payment and page view stats
Invalid package_id correctly rejected with 400 error
